mapper.select: SELECT id, place_id, name, description, capacity, default_duration_minutes, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted FROM rental_room WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, place_id, name, description, capacity, default_duration_minutes, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted FROM rental_room WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, place_id, name, description, capacity, default_duration_minutes, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted FROM rental_room WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_room ( place_id, name, description, capacity, default_duration_minutes, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{capacity}, #{defaultDurationMinutes}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_room SET place_id = #{placeId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, capacity = #{capacity}, default_duration_minutes = #{defaultDurationMinutes}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
